title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at BSNL Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at BSNL Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
BSNL Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BSNL Advisory Limited:
BSNL Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSNL Advisory Limited!
